name: crystalv2-lsp
description: Language Server Protocol support for Crystal V2

crystalv2.lsp.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server

crystalv2.lsp.debugLogPath.description: Write LSP debug logs (including semantic token samples) to this file path when set.

crystalv2.lsp.serverPath.description: Path to the Crystal V2 language server executable or compiler. Overrides automatic PATH discovery. Empty tries crystal2, crystal_v2, then crystal_v2_lsp.

crystalv2.lsp.serverArgs.description: Arguments passed to the configured language server executable. For compiler tool mode use ["tool", "lsp"]. Empty serverPath auto-adds ["tool", "lsp"] for crystal2/crystal_v2.
